title: 5TS Verifier Configuration
description: Configuration schema for 5TS verifiers (conformance bundle v1.0.2)

test_vectors_dir.description: Filesystem path to the test-vectors directory

clock_skew_tolerance_seconds.description: Optional timestamp tolerance for distributed components (see SPECIFICATION.md section 9.3). Tolerances above zero must be audit-logged.

verify_signatures.description: Whether to cryptographically verify signature fields. The quickstart validator checks structure only; full verifiers should enable this.

log_path.description: Optional path for immutable verification logs (see SPECIFICATION.md section 9.2)
